completed_tasks.name: Wire disk-registry routes + extend AgentConfigPayload with disk_allowlist
Plan 37-02 complete + merged into master
completed_tasks.notes: 204/204 lib tests green. Key deviation: EncryptionStatus uses manual match mapping (DB 'fully_encrypted' vs serde 'encrypted').

remaining_tasks.name: Extend AgentConfigPayload with disk_allowlist + apply server-pushed changes in config_poll_loop
Merge allowlist into DiskEnumerator.instance_id_map without clobbering live disks (Pitfall 5)

decisions.decision: Discard duplicate changes in main working tree before each worktree merge
decisions.rationale: Executor writes to both the worktree AND main tree. Must run git checkout -- <file> before merging worktree branch to avoid 'overwritten by merge' abort.
Pre-existing integration test compile errors in dlp-server are unrelated to phase 37. Use cargo test -p dlp-server --lib.

decisions.decision: Bash tool CWD drifts into worktrees — always verify with pwd before git ops
decisions.rationale: During session, Bash CWD silently moved to .claude/worktrees/agent-ab8033fbb4a917393. git commands ran against worktree branch instead of master. Always run pwd and git branch --show-current first.

next_action: Execute Wave 3 (plan 37-03): spawn gsd-executor for plan 37-03 using worktree isolation. Files: dlp-agent/src/server_client.rs + dlp-agent/src/service.rs. Critical: read 37-RESEARCH.md Pitfall 5 before implementing allowlist merge logic.
context_notes: Waves 1 and 2 of phase 37 are fully complete and merged into master (HEAD=4cc6b3e). Only Wave 3 remains: agent-side disk_allowlist sync. The server now delivers disk_allowlist in GET /agent-config/{id} (done in Wave 2). The agent side needs to receive and apply it in config_poll_loop. Key risk: merging server-pushed allowlist into DiskEnumerator.instance_id_map without clobbering live-enumerated disks (Pitfall 5 in 37-RESEARCH.md).
